♻️Legendary Hero Trading

Soul Exchange Helper

Convert your duplicates into legendary power. Trade in unwanted 5-star heroes for high-tier rewards from a curated, tiered selection.

  • ✦Tiered Costs Choose from three tiers of heroes costing either 10, 15, or 20 legendary souls.
  • ✦Single Trade You can only perform one exchange per event, so choose your new hero wisely.
  • ✦Fresh Start All received heroes start at level 1-1. Costumes are only included if explicitly shown in the preview.
  • ✦Elite Library Click any hero below to view their full stats and skills before committing to the trade.
Event Schedule

empuzzled.com – Soul Exchange 1 List

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the Soul Exchange event in Empires & Puzzles?+

Soul Exchange is a recurring event where you can trade duplicate Legendary (5★) heroes for a new hero from a curated list. You sacrifice a set number of heroes (5, 10, 15, or 20) to receive a guaranteed hero of your choice from the available pool.

How many heroes do I need for Soul Exchange?+

Soul Exchange offers heroes at different cost tiers: 5, 10, 15, or 20 Legendary heroes. Higher-cost tiers typically feature newer and more powerful heroes. Only maxed or unleveled Legendary heroes can be traded.

Which heroes should I trade in Soul Exchange?+

Trade duplicate heroes or older heroes that no longer fit your roster. Check the Hero Database and Tier Lists to evaluate whether a hero is still useful before trading. Avoid trading heroes that might receive balance updates or costumes.

How often does Soul Exchange happen?+

Soul Exchange events typically occur once per month. The hero pool rotates each time with a mix of older and newer Legendary heroes across different cost tiers.
